name: Close to Swiss Chalet Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the water and tomato juice into a 1½ quart saucepan.
2. Add the chicken bouillon cube, paprika, sugar, salt, basil, parsley, poultry seasoning, thyme, ginger, mustard, onion powder, bay leaf, Worcestershire sauce, and Tabasco.
3. Stir well or whisk to mix.
4. Bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Remove the bay leaf.
6. Stir in lemon juice.
7. Mix cornstarch and 1 tbsp water to form a smooth paste.
8. Add to the sauce and cook, stirring constantly, until thickened about 2 minutes.
9. Whisk in vegetable oil.
